The '''chiliox tree''' was a fruit-bearing [[Tree/Legends|tree]] native to the [[Anx/Legends|Anx]] homeworld of [[Gravlex Med/Legends|Gravlex Med]]. The fruit of the chiliox fed many of the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] herbivorous creatures, and was also the diet of the ancient ancestors of the Anx species.<ref name="Gamer" />
